steps.name: $("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'User ID')] and th[contains(text(), 'Car Id')]]/ancestor::table") should be(visible)
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'User ID')] and th[contains(text(), 'House ID')]]/ancestor::table") should be(visible)
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'Floors')] and th[contains(text(), 'Price')]]/ancestor::table//tbody//td[2]/input") should be(clickable: interactable and enabled)
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'Floors')] and th[contains(text(), 'Price')]]/ancestor::table//tbody//td[3]/input") should be(clickable: interactable and enabled)
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'Floors')] and th[contains(text(), 'Price')]]/ancestor::table/parent::div//button[contains(@class, 'status')]") should not have([text "Status: not pushed", 120s])
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'Floors')] and th[contains(text(), 'Price')]]/ancestor::table/parent::div//button[contains(@class, 'status')]") should not have(text "Status: not pushed")
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'User ID')] and th[contains(text(), 'Car Id')]]/ancestor::table") should be(visible)
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'User ID')] and th[contains(text(), 'House ID')]]/ancestor::table") should be(visible)
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'Floors')] and th[contains(text(), 'Price')]]/ancestor::table//tbody//td[2]/input") should be(clickable: interactable and enabled)
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'Floors')] and th[contains(text(), 'Price')]]/ancestor::table//tbody//td[3]/input") should be(clickable: interactable and enabled)

$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'Floors')] and th[contains(text(), 'Price')]]/ancestor::table/parent::div//button[contains(@class, 'status')]") should not have(text "Status: not pushed")
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'User ID')] and th[contains(text(), 'Car Id')]]/ancestor::table") should be(visible)
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'User ID')] and th[contains(text(), 'House ID')]]/ancestor::table") should be(visible)
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'Floors')] and th[contains(text(), 'Price')]]/ancestor::table//tbody//td[2]/input") should be(clickable: interactable and enabled)
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'Floors')] and th[contains(text(), 'Price')]]/ancestor::table//tbody//td[3]/input") should be(clickable: interactable and enabled)
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'Floors')] and th[contains(text(), 'Price')]]/ancestor::table/parent::div//button[contains(@class, 'status')]") should not have([text "Status: not pushed", 120s])
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'Floors')] and th[contains(text(), 'Price')]]/ancestor::table/parent::div//button[contains(@class, 'status')]") should not have(text "Status: not pushed")
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'Floors')] and th[contains(text(), 'Price')]]/ancestor::table/parent::div//button[contains(@class, 'status')]") should not have(text "Status: not pushed")
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'Floors')] and th[contains(text(), 'Price')]]/ancestor::table/parent::div/div/button[3]") should not be(empty: attribute value="" and exact text "")
